一位香港房地产大亨希望在爱尔兰建造一座城市，以收容来自这个半自治城市的5万名移民。
国际特许城市投资公司维多利亚港集团(VHG)的创始人伊万·科(Ivan Ko)希望在都柏林和贝尔法斯特之间找到一块50平方公里的选址，从头开始创建一座名为Nextpolis的新城市。
Ko向爱尔兰官员推销了这项计划，其中将包括用粤语授课的学校，辩称这将符合政府声明的发展首都以外地区的愿望。
在考虑的六个地点中，最受欢迎的是德罗赫达和邓达尔克之间的一个地点，靠近北爱尔兰边境，距离都柏林机场不远。
“我们喜欢爱尔兰，”柯震东周二告诉“卫报”。“公司税非常低。你们有非常强大的制造业和生物医药公司。各大科技巨头都在那里设立了欧洲总部。总体而言，我们认为爱尔兰的表现非常好。“。
外交部在都柏林的一位发言人证实，已经与柯震东进行了会谈，但似乎给这个想法泼了一盆冷水。“在2019年12月初步接触后，该部与相关个人进行了有限的接触，以提供关于爱尔兰的有用和现实的指导。自提供这项指引以来，署方并没有就此事采取进一步行动。“。
《泰晤士报》上周末报道了柯震东最初的规划-设想建立一个面积超过500平方公里、拥有50万香港人的自治城市。
他告诉卫报，在得到爱尔兰和其他潜在东道主的反馈后，他大幅缩减了这一规模。他说：“我们发现复制香港模式并不合适，好像我们是在强加一些东西，而香港人会被视为与其他人口隔离。所以我们换了另一种型号。“
高说，新版本将遵循东道主的政治制度。“我们没有单独的边界或我们自己的国家-只是一个新的城市，让香港人生活在一起，同时与当地企业融合，这样我们就可以最大限度地造福双方。”
Ko说，如果大流行限制放松，他希望今年晚些时候率领一个代表团前往爱尔兰，会见当地人并检查潜在的地点。
Ko说，吸引人的地方包括爱尔兰的低人口密度和英国退欧为其金融服务业创造了机会。他补充说，他正在考虑更多的国家，他拒绝透露这些国家的名字。
邓达尔克商会发言人帕迪·马龙(Paddy Malone)表示，M1走廊地区可以主办这样一座城市。“我们的地理位置非常有利，因为我们拥有应对扩张的基础设施。”
他说，来自香港的移民将享受快速宽带，可以进入三个机场和七所大学，如果他们更喜欢住在英国，还可以从北爱尔兰通勤。“如果要在爱尔兰住宿，我们就是最佳地点。”
中国最近在该地区实施国家安全法，促使许多香港人考虑离开。英国政府已承诺提供援助和搬迁。
在特许城市学院的播客中，Ko将任何这样的移民都与1602年乘坐五月花号前往美国的移民相提并论。“我们追求的是自由和民主，这有点类似于为了追求宗教自由而离开欧洲的朝圣者和清教徒。”
note_en:
A Hong Kong property tycoon wants to build a city in  Ireland to host 50,000 emigrants from the semi-autonomous city.
 Ivan Ko, the founder of the Victoria Harbour Group (VHG), an international charter city investment company, hopes to find a 50 sq km site between Dublin and Belfast to create a new city, named Nextpolis, from scratch.
 Ko has pitched the plan, which would include schools that teach in Cantonese, to Irish officials, arguing it would fit the government’s stated desire to develop regions outside the capital.
 Of six locations under consideration the favourite is a site between Drogheda and Dundalk, near the border with Northern  Ireland and within striking distance of Dublin airport.
 “We like Ireland,” Ko told the Guardian on Tuesday. “Corporate taxes are very low. You have a very strong manufacturing and biomedical companies. Major tech giants have European headquarters there. Overall we think Ireland is very good.”
 A department of foreign affairs spokesperson in Dublin confirmed there had been talks with Ko but appeared to pour cold water on the idea. “Following an initial approach in December 2019, the department had limited contact with the individuals involved to provide helpful and realistic guidance about Ireland. Since providing this guidance there has been no further action taken by the department in this matter,” they said.
 Ko’s original pitch – reported by the Times last weekend – envisaged an autonomous city for 500,000 Hongkongers over 500 sq km.
 He drastically scaled that down after feedback from Ireland and other potential hosts, he told the Guardian. “We found out that replicating the Hong Kong model was not suitable, as if we were imposing something, and that  Hong Kong people would be seen as segregated from the rest of the population. So we changed to another model.”
 The new version will follow the host’s political system, said Ko. “We don’t have a separate border or our own country – just a new city to let Hong Kong people live together and at the same time integrate with local businesses so we can maximise the benefits to both sides.”
 Ko said he hoped to lead a delegation to Ireland later this year, if pandemic restrictions ease, to meet local people and inspect potential sites.
 Attractions included Ireland’s low population density and Brexit creating opportunities for its financial services sector, Ko said. He added he was considering additional countries, which he declined to name.
  Paddy Malone, a spokesperson for Dundalk’s chamber of commerce, said the  M1 corridor region could host such a city. “We would be ideally located to facilitate this in that we have the infrastructure in place to cope with an expansion.”
 Settlers from Hong Kong would enjoy fast broadband, access to three airports and seven universities and be able to commute from Northern Ireland should they prefer to live in the UK, he said. “If it’s going to be accommodated in Ireland we are the prime location.”
 China’s recent  imposition of national security laws in the region has prompted many Hongkongers to consider leaving. The British government has promised to provide assistance and relocation.
 In a Charter Cities Institute  podcast Ko compared any such migration to those who sailed on the Mayflower to America in 1602. “We are in pursuit of freedom and democracy, which is a little bit similar to the pilgrims and the puritans who left Europe in pursuit of religious freedom.”
title: 香港地产大亨向爱尔兰推销新的城市理念
title_en: Hong Kong property tycoon pitches new city idea to Ireland

没有多少人注意到WSL2对于从Windows10开发新软件应用程序的开发者来说是多么重要，使它成为一个真正的开发箱，其中不再需要双引导，也不再需要为Linux操作系统使用那些GB的未使用空间而有一个单独的分区，担心以后升级或修补该分区，或者在你的HD中没有使用这些GB的空间。我们现在是在一个新的世界里，微软已经完全接受了Linux及其对社区的好处，我现在也相信微软喜欢开源和Linux，我相信集装化肯定是我们带来这种势头的原因，所以感谢Linux、Ubuntu、Docker、Kubernetes和微软的这件艺术品。
我在这里的目标只是向你展示如何使用WSL2快速启动和运行环境，另外还有一个GUI环境，如果你有任何问题，请在评论中让我知道，这样我就可以尝试帮助你，如果你喜欢的话，也一定要让我知道。
Windows10的版本是2004年，最低版本是19041，通常在Windows10的更新中提供，甚至家庭版也是如此。键入Windows+R，然后运行Winver&#34；。如果你还不在那里，那就继续运行你会得到的Windows更新。
我会把来自微软的说明URL留在这里，他们已经很好地覆盖了它。
在Linux方面，我个人推荐微软商店提供的最新Ubuntu版本，现在就是Ubuntu20.04LTS。
任何时候你想要在Windows端看到一个gui应用程序，你都需要运行这个配置，这样你就可以保存它，如果你想从linux IDE可视化任何东西，比如浏览器或任何其他软件，只要在需要的时候运行配置文件即可。
现在，您可以在Ubuntu上安装Docker或不安装Docker，这取决于您是否拥有NodeJS、.Net Core、Java、Python或任何您想要的东西，并开始使用您的新开发环境。VSCode WSL扩展也可以与Docker容器一起使用，通过我提供的设置，我们不仅可以处理服务器代码，还可以处理任何与桌面相关的代码，您可能还想在Windows和Linux上使用许多项目来测试和调试这些代码，或者您可能想要查看Web项目在Linux浏览器上的外观和呈现方式，IDE也会考虑调试方面，这有更多的可能性。
note_en:
Not a lot of people noticed what a big deal WSL2 is for developers of new software applications from a Windows 10 and making it a true dev box in which there's no more need for dual-boot or having a separate partition for that Linux OS with those GBs of unused space, being worried about upgrading or patching that Partition later on or having those GBs unused in your HD. We are in a new world now and Microsoft has fully embraced Linux and its benefits for the community, I now also believe that Microsoft loves open source and Linux and I believe that Containerization is certainly what has brought us to this momentum so thank you Linux, Ubuntu, Docker, Kubernetes and Microsoft for this piece of art.
 My objective here is to just show you how to get and environment up and running quickly with WSL2 and plus having a GUI environment with it, if you have any issues please let me know in the comments so I can try to help, if you like it make sure to let me know too.
    Windows 10 with the version 2004 and at least build 19041, which is generally available in the Windows 10 update of even a Home Edition. Type in Windows+R and then run "winver". If you're not there yet keep on running the windows updates that you'll get there.
   I will leave the instructions URL from microsoft here they have it very well covered.
  On the linux side I personally recommend from the Microsoft Store the latest Ubuntu version available, right now Ubuntu 20.04 LTS.
          Any time you want to see a gui application on the Windows side you will need to run this configuration so you can save it and just run the configuration file when needed if you want to visualize anything from Linux IDE like browser or any other software.
                             You can now install Docker on Ubuntu or not, up to you and have NodeJS, .Net Core, Java, Python or whatever you want and start working with your new dev environment. The VSCode WSL Extension works with Docker containers as well, with the setup I provided you're not limited to working in server code but also on working on Any Desktop related code that maybe you also want to test and debug on Windows and Linux with many projects or maybe you want to see the look and feel of a web project on how it looks and renders on a Linux browser instead, many more possibilities with IDE also thinking about debugging aspects.
